selections.name: Coco Affair
selections.reason: Unraced filly from the O'Shea/Charlton yard who has looked exceptional in trials, winning three from three. Drawn perfectly and finds a winnable race on debut.

selections.name: She's Extra
selections.reason: Dominant 4L winner on debut at Newcastle. The wide barrier is a concern, but she has race experience and raw ability.

selections.name: Promenade
selections.reason: Godolphin 2yo who won a trial at Randwick. Stable is firing with juveniles.

selections.name: Bonfire Star
selections.reason: Snowden colt making debut. Trialled solidly and draws a soft gate.

danger_horse.name: She's Extra
danger_horse.reason: Impressive debut winner who could easily repeat if she handles the heavy track.

selections.name: Sarapo
selections.reason: Third-up and ready to peak. Ran well first-up and Nash Rawiller sticks. Proven at the distance range.

selections.name: Oso Spirited
selections.reason: Waterhouse/Bott runner resuming. Won a recent trial and maps to lead or sit handy. Sire Charm Spirit's progeny generally handle wet.

selections.name: Garrix
selections.reason: Improving type from the Waller yard. Hitting the line well and should appreciate the mile.

selections.name: Iron Legend
selections.reason: Solid return when 3rd at Hawkesbury. Will strip fitter and handles the conditions.

danger_horse.name: Oso Spirited
danger_horse.reason: On-pace runner from top stable who could control the race.

selections.name: Just Maz
selections.reason: Won on debut at Canterbury on soft ground. Draws the rails and looks the one to beat in a field decimated by scratchings.

selections.name: Kakadu Sunset
selections.reason: Resuming. Placed in G3 company last prep. Class runner of the field and trialled well.

selections.name: Scrumptious
selections.reason: Consistent filly who rarely runs a bad race. Fit and maps well.

selections.name: Ahellbenda
selections.reason: Has some ability but needs to improve on recent form. Place chance in small field.

danger_horse.name: Kakadu Sunset
danger_horse.reason: Group class form is superior to these if ready to go first-up.

selections.name: Vienna Vixen
selections.reason: Consistent mare who handles soft going well (11:2-1-3). Good 2nd last start and looks ready to win.

selections.name: Autumn Dream
selections.reason: Excellent 2nd fresh at this track. Fitter now and gets in well with the claim.

selections.name: Rileycat
selections.reason: Coming off a win at Goulburn. Handles soft tracks and maps to get a good run.

selections.name: Spirit Of Camelot
selections.reason: Classy import resuming. May need the run but has quality.

danger_horse.name: Autumn Dream
danger_horse.reason: Track specialist who ran a bold race first-up.

selections.name: Tai Lung
selections.reason: Absolute wet tracker with 2 wins and multiple placings on heavy. Won last start and conditions suit perfectly.

selections.name: Gambler
selections.reason: Won last start and has won on heavy before. Snowden polish and draws well.

selections.name: Taxation
selections.reason: Resuming. Won on heavy on debut. Pride stable excels with fresh sprinters.

selections.name: Manukau
selections.reason: Chasing a hat-trick. In career best form and must be respected.

danger_horse.name: Gambler
danger_horse.reason: In winning form and handles the sting out of the ground.

selections.name: Gentileschi
selections.reason: Ready to peak 3rd up. Drawn barrier 1 and has won on heavy. Looks well placed.

selections.name: Goofinator
selections.reason: Last start winner who handles heavy going. Wide gate is the only negative but has stamina.

selections.name: Suit Of Armour
selections.reason: Zac Lloyd sticks. Should be ready to show best form now 3rd up.

selections.name: Mr Fabulous
selections.reason: Won last start at Kembla. Tough gelding who stays all day.

danger_horse.name: Goofinator
danger_horse.reason: Proven in the conditions and winning form is hard to ignore.

selections.name: Nana's Wish
selections.reason: Superior wet track stats (7:2-2-0 on heavy). Resuming for Maher stable and looks primed for this.

selections.name: Scalextrics
selections.reason: Mudlark with 3 wins on heavy. At big odds could run a race if conditions are testing.

selections.name: Zulfiqar
selections.reason: Good 2nd last start. Handles the ground and Jason Collett rides.

selections.name: Wrathful
selections.reason: Waller runner who handles the wet. Will be running on late.

danger_horse.name: Scalextrics
danger_horse.reason: Massive value runner who loves the mud.

selections.name: Who But Roo
selections.reason: Runner-up in Open class last start. Has won twice on heavy and draws well.

selections.name: Xpresso
selections.reason: Consistent sprinter who handles heavy. Will go forward and give a sight.

selections.name: Wallenda
selections.reason: Maher runner dropping in grade. Barrier 1 helps.

selections.name: Oakfield Badger
selections.reason: Consistent type who handles the wet. Place chance.
